allow: Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=5 max@pi-workstation "uname -m; cat /etc/os-release | head -3; free -h | head -2; df -h / | tail -1")
Bash(ssh -tt max@pi-workstation 'curl -fsSL https://nodejs.org/dist/v22.15.0/node-v22.15.0-linux-arm64.tar.xz | sudo tar -xJ --strip-components=1 -C /usr/local && node --version && npm --version')
Bash(ssh max@pi-workstation 'claude auth --help 2>&1 || claude config --help 2>&1 | head -20')
Bash(ssh max@pi-workstation 'sudo apt install -y dnsmasq 2>&1 | tail -3')

Bash(ssh max@pi-workstation 'sudo tee /etc/dnsmasq.d/nextdns.conf > /dev/null << "EOF"
no-resolv
bogus-priv
strict-order
server=2a07:a8c1::
server=45.90.30.0
server=2a07:a8c0::
server=45.90.28.0
add-cpe-id=7eb5e4
EOF
echo "Config written" && sudo systemctl restart dnsmasq && echo "dnsmasq restarted" && sudo systemctl status dnsmasq | head -5')
Bash(ssh max@pi-workstation 'nslookup google.com 2>&1 || host google.com 2>&1 || ping -c1 google.com 2>&1 | head -3')
Bash(ssh max@pi-workstation 'echo "=== Disk ===" && df -h /home && echo "=== Home size ===" && du -sh /home/max 2>/dev/null && echo "=== Free vs Used ===" && df -h / | tail -1')
Bash(ssh max@pi-workstation 'sudo apt install -y ecryptfs-utils cryptsetup 2>&1 | tail -5')

Bash(ssh max@pi-workstation 'printf "%s" "$\(cat /etc/passwd | grep ^max | cut -d: -f5\)" | ecryptfs-unwrap-passphrase ~/.ecryptfs/wrapped-passphrase - 2>/dev/null || echo "needs interactive password"')

Bash(ssh max@pi-workstation 'sudo mkdir -p /etc/ssh/authorized_keys && sudo cp ~/.ssh/authorized_keys /etc/ssh/authorized_keys/max && sudo chmod 644 /etc/ssh/authorized_keys/max && sudo chown root:root /etc/ssh/authorized_keys/max && echo "done"')

Bash(ssh max@pi-workstation 'sudo sed -i "s|#AuthorizedKeysFile.*|AuthorizedKeysFile /etc/ssh/authorized_keys/%u .ssh/authorized_keys|" /etc/ssh/sshd_config && grep "AuthorizedKeysFile" /etc/ssh/sshd_config && sudo systemctl restart sshd && echo "sshd restarted"')
Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes max@pi-workstation 'echo "SSH sin password OK"' 2>&1)
Bash(ssh max@pi-workstation 'free -h && echo "=== swap ===" && swapon --show && echo "=== disk ===" && df -h / | tail -1')
Bash(ssh max@pi-workstation 'source ~/clients/mutt/.venv/bin/activate && pip install aws-mfa 2>&1 | tail -3')
Bash(ssh max@pi-workstation 'source ~/clients/mutt/.venv/bin/activate && python -m pip install aws-mfa 2>&1 | tail -5')
Bash(ssh max@pi-workstation 'source ~/.local/bin/env && cd ~/clients/mutt && uv pip install aws-mfa 2>&1 | tail -5')
Bash(ssh max@pi-workstation 'cat ~/clients/mutt/sec/claude-code 2>/dev/null || echo "no claude-code secret"; ls ~/clients/mutt/sec/')
Bash(ssh max@pi-workstation 'which envy 2>/dev/null && envy --help 2>&1 | head -10 || echo "no envy"')

Bash(ssh max@pi-workstation 'source ~/.zshrc 2>/dev/null; echo "=== Wazuh ===" && sudo systemctl is-active wazuh-agent.service 2>&1; echo "=== NextDNS ===" && cat /etc/dnsmasq.d/nextdns.conf 2>&1; echo "=== ClamAV ===" && sudo systemctl is-active clamav-daemon.service 2>&1; echo "=== Encryption ===" && find /home -maxdepth 1 -type d -exec findmnt -no FSTYPE {} \\; 2>&1; echo "=== Wazuh config ===" && sudo cat /var/ossec/etc/ossec.conf 2>&1 | head -50')
Bash(ssh max@pi-workstation 'sudo mkdir -p /etc/ssh/authorized_keys && sudo cp /etc/ssh/authorized_keys/max /etc/ssh/authorized_keys/encryption_user 2>/dev/null; echo "done"')

Bash(ssh encryption_user@pi-workstation 'sudo wipefs -a /dev/sda && echo "wiped" && sudo parted /dev/sda --script mklabel gpt && echo "gpt label" && sudo parted /dev/sda --script mkpart swap linux-swap 1MiB 4GiB && echo "swap partition" && sudo parted /dev/sda --script mkpart home ext4 4GiB 100% && echo "home partition" && sudo parted /dev/sda --script print')
Bash(ssh max@pi-workstation 'echo "encryption_user ALL=\(ALL\) NOPASSWD: ALL" | sudo tee /etc/sudoers.d/encryption_user && echo "done"')
Bash(ssh encryption_user@pi-workstation 'sudo loginctl kill-user max 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; echo "max killed"; lsblk /dev/sda')
Bash(ssh encryption_user@pi-workstation 'sudo mkswap /dev/sda1 && echo "swap OK" && sudo mkfs.ext4 -L home /dev/sda2 && echo "ext4 OK"')

Bash(ssh max@pi-workstation 'sudo rm -rf /home.old && echo "old home deleted" && sudo userdel --remove encryption_user 2>/dev/null; sudo rm -f /etc/sudoers.d/encryption_user /etc/ssh/authorized_keys/encryption_user && echo "encryption_user removed"')
Bash(ssh encryption_user@pi-workstation 'echo test' 2>&1; ssh max@pi-workstation 'sudo rm -rf /home.old 2>&1; ls /home.old 2>&1 || echo "cleaned"')
Bash(ssh max@pi-workstation 'sudo rm -rf /home.old && echo "cleaned" || echo "still busy"')
Bash(ssh max@pi-workstation 'sudo systemctl enable wazuh-agent && sudo systemctl start wazuh-agent && sudo systemctl is-active wazuh-agent')
